title: How can I change a dropdown or a text colum based on a specific person being assigned?
excerpt: Some of my colleagues work in specific segments and I want to create an automation to change a dropdown or a text column each time one of them gets assigned. How can I do that?

posts.author: d.caldeira-pires (Diogo Caldeira Pires)
posts.cookedHtml: Some of my colleagues work in specific segments and I want to create an automation to change a dropdown or a text column each time one of them gets assigned. How can I do that?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can use a text column with AI turned on

image1421×387 58 KB

posts.author: d.caldeira-pires (Diogo Caldeira Pires)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Clover_Gal ,
Thank you for coming back to me.
Thats very advanced for me
How do I turn on the AI? I don’t see that option. Please let me know.
Best
Diogo

posts.author: Karmon (Karen)
posts.cookedHtml: You can set up an automation in Monday by using the “When person is assigned, change column value” option. Go to Automations > Create Custom Automation and set the trigger as “When [Person] is assigned” and the action as “Change [Dropdown/Text] column to [Value].”

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: AI is in your Admin settings, it’s super easy once you get it turned on
